title: GPS jammed on RAF jet carrying UK defence secretary close to Russian border
description: Russia suspected of obstructing signal on flight bringing John Healey home from visit to British troops in Estonia
content:
An RAF jet carrying the defence secretary, John Healey, had its signal jammed for the entire three-hour flight after it flew near the Russian border.
Healey had been visiting British soldiers in Estonia and was travelling back to the UK when the elec... [2182 chars]

title: Relegation the inevitable outcome of West Ham’s relentless executive failure
description: Once-proud club has forgotten what it was trying to be after years of mismanagement in a shopping-centre annexe
content: If you’re going to die, die with your boots on. Belatedly and pointlessly on. But on all the same. It felt deeply fitting that West Ham should show some fight on the final day of the Premier League season, but that relegation should still be confirme... [5234 chars]

title: UK beer boom goes flat as breweries call last orders
description: The UK's brewery scene is shrinking as pubs close, costs rise and drinking habits change.
content:
Walking down the streets of Burton-upon-Trent 30 years ago, Al Wall could smell different aspects of the beer brewing process through the day - but those moments are now few and far between.
He is the head brewer at the oldest and largest independent... [4751 chars]

title: Sun Pharma, Coforge: Indian businesses go shopping abroad as growth slows at home
description: India Inc spent $18bn on global buyouts in 2025 and the deal value could cross $15bn in the first half of 2026.
content:
In late April, India's Sun Pharmaceuticals agreed to pay $11.75bn (£8.59bn) to acquire New York-listed women's health and biosimilars firm Organon & Co.
It marked the biggest overseas acquisition by an Indian company in nearly two decades and followe... [5351 chars]
